title: Taylor's Eye Witness Maple 2 Piece 20cm Table Spoon Set with Fine Polished Finish - Rust Resistant 430 Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery. Perfect for Dining, Serving & Cooking. 5 Year Guarantee
features: PREMIUM-GRADE 430 STAINLESS STEEL TABLE SPOONS – Flimsy spoons bend under pressure, rust over time, & lose their durability with frequent use. Taylor's Eye Witness table spoons are built differently! They are forged from high-quality 430 stainless steel, a durable material recognised for its ferritic microstructure, which provides superior resistance to corrosion, staining, & everyday wear. With a precise 3mm handle gauge for added rigidity, they resist bending & deformation under normal use.

FINE MIRROR-POLISHED FINISH FOR A SLEEK, ELEGANT LOOK – Standard spoons develop scratches, water stains, & dull surfaces that degrade your dining experience. These tablespoons feature a fine polished finish, providing a naturally smooth, non-porous surface that is resistant to micro-scratches & discolouration. And they won’t look out of place at even the most sophisticated dinner parties. Unlike low-quality cutlery, these spoons retain their lustre even after repeated use & washing.

PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY DINING, SERVING, AND COOKING – Using spoons that are too small for serving or too large for comfortable use can be inconvenient. Not with our tablespoons! Combining practicality & style in equal measure, their 20cm length ensures optimal reach—whether for eating, portioning, or stirring—while the deep-set, elliptical bowl maximises scooping efficiency for liquids, grains, & semi-solid foods. Plus, its ergonomic handle provides a stable, balanced grip & precise control.

EASY TO CLEAN AND 100% DISHWASHER SAFE – Some spoons trap food particles, stain easily, or require excessive scrubbing to clean properly. But Taylor's Eye Witness tablespoons feature a smooth, non-reactive stainless steel surface that prevents food from sticking & ensures effortless cleaning. Fully dishwasher-safe, they withstand high temperatures & repeated wash cycles without dulling or corroding. Plus, its design minimises crevices where residue can accumulate, maintaining optimal hygiene.

BUILT TO LAST, BACKED BY A 5-YEAR GUARANTEE – Many spoons lose their shape, break, or show signs of wear within months. But not ours. Our tablespoons are constructed to maintain long-term performance. Here at Taylor's Eye Witness, we’re so confident in the strength & quality of our product that any item found compromised will be replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. We've been making kitchen tools for over 150 years & pride ourselves on the reliability of our products.
description: You know the feeling—you sit down for a nice meal, grab a spoon, and within seconds, you’re annoyed. It’s too flimsy, the edges feel rough, or worse, it bends when you scoop something heavier than soup. And what about those spoons that leave a weird metallic taste behind? It’s frustrating when something as simple as a tablespoon doesn’t do its job properly. That’s exactly why the Maple Set of 2 Tablespoons by Taylor’s Eye Witness exists—to put an end to these everyday annoyances and provide you with cutlery that feels just right, every single time. Solid, Stylish, and Built for Everyday Use These Maple Tablespoons are crafted from high-quality 430 stainless steel , meaning they won’t rust, bend, or tarnish over time. Unlike cheap alternatives that feel awkward in your hand, these spoons have a solid 3mm handle gauge, giving them just the right weight and balance. Whether you’re stirring your morning coffee, scooping hearty stews, or serving side dishes, these spoons handle it all effortlessly. Plus, their fine mirror-polished finish doesn’t just look elegant—it also resists watermarks and stains, keeping them looking brand new with minimal effort. Effortless Cleaning & Long-Lasting Quality These spoons are 100% dishwasher safe, so you can simply toss them in without a second thought. Their high-quality stainless steel prevents food from sticking, making rinsing a breeze—even if you prefer to hand-wash them. And because they’re backed by a 5-year guarantee , you can trust that these aren’t just another set of spoons you’ll need to replace in a few months. They’re designed to last, so you can enjoy stress-free dining every day. Designed by Taylor’s Eye Witness, a trusted British brand with over 150 years of expertise in crafting high-quality kitchenware, these spoons are built to last and ready to impress for years to come.
